headline: Peloton Interactive appoints Chief Accounting Officer Saqib Baig as interim Chief Financial Officer, effective March 27, 2026.
investor_impact: The appointment of an internal veteran as interim CFO provides near-term stability and continuity in financial reporting following the previously disclosed departure of Liz Coddington. Investors will likely monitor the ongoing search for a permanent CFO to gauge the company's long-term financial strategy and turnaround efforts.
